case_title: KACHER, AMY WARDELL VS BOUDREAU, MICHELLE

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF FILED. REQUEST FOR NEW COURT DATE.
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-22-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,249.00 FILED BY KACHER, AMY WARDELL AS TO DEFENDANT BOUDREAU, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE. NO FILING FEE SUBMITTED. FILE IS IN RM. 506 ALREADY.

RETURNED/INVALID CHECK ENTERED AS TO TRANSACTION #
NOTICE TO BOUDREAU, MICHELLE RE RETURNED CHECK, RETURNED UNDELIVERED.

DEFT CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED LESS THAN 10 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DATE. $10 FEE PAID. SUBMITTED TO COMM. FOR ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KACHER, AMY WARDELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUDREAU, MICHELLE $1,249.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,331.00, DEFENDANT FILED A LATE REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE WITHOUT A SHOWING OF GOOD CAUSE OF WHY IT WAS FILED LESS THAN 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
